name: extension-application-customizer
description: A SharePoint Framework Application Customizer extension template

libraryName.description: The name of the library (also used as the package name)

featureId.description: The feature ID (GUID) for the solution feature

solutionId.description: The solution ID (GUID) for the SharePoint solution

componentId.description: The component ID (GUID) for the extension

componentAlias.description: The component alias (in manifest) for the extension

componentNameUnescaped.description: The component name (in manifest) for the extension, unescaped

componentNameCamelCase.description: The component name (in manifest) for the extension, in camel case

componentNameHyphenCase.description: The component name (in manifest) for the extension, in hyphen case

componentNameCapitalCase.description: The component class name for the extension
